data.title: Bitcoin Demand Declines as Whale Addresses Shift to Selling
data.description: Bitcoin's demand experienced a significant downturn, turning negative by approximately 63,000 BTC at the end of March. According to NS3.AI, CryptoQuant reported that whale addresses, which had been steadily accumulating Bitcoin, shifted their strategy to net selling. This change in behavior among large holders has raised concerns about the cryptocurrency's market dynamics.

data.title: Orca CEO Assures User Funds Are Safe Following Drift Attack
data.description: Solana liquidity protocol Orca's CEO, Michael Hwang, has stated that Orca remains unaffected by the recent Drift attack, ensuring the safety of user funds. According to Foresight News, Hwang emphasized that Orca's smart contracts have been audited by four independent firms, and its operational security measures have recently undergone review by external security consultants.

data.title: The Drift hacker's linked address likely originated from Backpack, or left clues related to KYC verification.
data.description: SendAI developer aryan posted on X: "I found some interesting clues on-chain: The Drift attacker address (HkG...ZES) received funds through Near Intents 8 days ago, but remained inactive until suddenly receiving a large amount of funds from the Drift vault; the attacker then transferred/exchanged these funds to a money laundering address (8ub...Gxw) and several other addresses, all of which received funds through Backpack just yesterday. This is interesting because it means that Backpack may have performed KYC on these accounts; then, these money laundering addresses transferred the funds to an Ethereum address through Wormhole, which had previously received funds through Tornado Cash."

data.title: European Stock Futures Experience Decline
data.description: European stock futures have seen a notable decline. According to ChainCatcher, the Euro Stoxx 50 futures fell by 1.2%, while Germany's DAX futures also decreased by 1.2%. Additionally, the UK's FTSE 100 futures experienced a 0.2% drop.

data.title: Account with over $1.7 million in profits and a total purchase of $160,000. NBA regular season game: Spurs defeat Warriors.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Bulls vs. Pacers" prediction event, an account with over $1.7 million in profits (address: 0xbddf61af533ff524d27154e589d2d7a81510c684) purchased $160,000 worth of bets on the Spurs defeating the Warriors. The NBA regular season game between the Spurs and Warriors tipped off at 10:00 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end; the Spurs have a record of 57 wins and 18 losses, ranking 2nd in the Western Conference; the Warriors have a record of 36 wins and 39 losses, ranking 10th in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Yu Xian: Drift migrated its multi-signature service a week ago. The new multi-signature service only requires a 2/5 signature threshold and has no time lock.
data.description: Yu Xian, founder of SlowMist, posted on X: "Drift Protocol suffered a loss of over $200 million. A week ago, they migrated to a 2/5 multisignature pool (1 old + 4 new signers) without timelock. A few hours ago, the attackers took over admin privileges, minted CVT counterfeit coins, manipulated the oracle, disabled relevant security mechanisms, and absconded with the pool's valuable assets..."

data.title: Iran launches missile in response to Trump's speech
data.description: According to Al Jazeera: Just as Trump concluded his national address, Iran launched another large number of missiles at Israel. (Jinshi)

data.title: ZachXBT again criticized Circle for its inaction in the Drift hack, which allowed illicit funds to leak from Solana via CCTP.
data.description: Renowned blockchain analyst ZachXBT has once again criticized Circle, stating that the Drift hack occurred during US trading hours, with millions of USDC being transferred from Solana to Ethereum via CCTP (Circle's cross-chain protocol), while Circle remained dormant and inactive. Just days earlier, Circle had also arbitrarily frozen at least 16 enterprise hot wallets, which are still slowly unfreezing. ZachXBT concluded by saying, "Circle is a bad actor in this industry."

data.title: The whale pension-usdt.eth holds a short position of $92.4 million, with a floating profit of $1.6 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the whale pension-usdt.eth (0x0ddf...a902) opened a new short position of 20,000 ETH with 3x leverage and increased its short position of BTC with 3x leverage to 750 BTC, with a total value of $92.4 million. Currently, this address has a floating profit of over $1.6 million and a total profit of over $32 million.

data.title: XRP Spot ETF Experiences Significant Outflow
data.description:
According to Odaily, data from SoSoValue indicates that on April 1, Eastern Time, the XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $1.3158 million in a single day.

The outflow was solely from the 21Shares XRP ETF (TOXR), which recorded a daily net outflow of $1.3158 million. The historical total net inflow now stands at -$25.1838 million.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of the XRP spot ETF is $948 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.14%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $1.208 billion.

data.title: Most Hong Kong-listed OpenClaw concept stocks fell.
data.description: Most Hong Kong-listed OpenClaw concept stocks declined, with Zhipu (02513.HK) falling over 15%, MINIMAX-W (00100.HK) falling over 9%, Kingsoft Cloud (03896.HK) and Xiaomi Group (01810.HK) falling over 3%, and Alibaba (09988.HK) and Meituan (03690.HK) falling over 2%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Military upgrade expectations offset the positive impact of troop withdrawal; Trump's speech triggered a major market shock.
data.description: Trump delivered a rare prime-time national televised address from the White House. He attempted to reassure the American public, whose financial markets were turbulent and whose political approval ratings were suffering due to the war, declaring that the war against Iran was "very close" to its end. However, as Trump hinted that military action could escalate in the near future, international spot gold and silver prices plummeted, while WTI and Brent crude oil prices continued to rise. As of press time, spot gold had fallen by more than $100, spot silver by more than 3%, and both WTI and Brent crude oil prices rose by more than 5%. This speech highlighted the immense pressure Trump faces to clarify the war's objectives to the public and to find an "exit strategy" for the increasingly uncontrollable conflict that has entered its fifth week. It is noteworthy that this speech, in some ways, resembled an initial mobilization for the start of the war rather than a summary after a month of fighting. Currently, the Strait of Hormuz, which accounts for one-fifth of global seaborne oil, has been largely blocked since the outbreak of the war, becoming a major economic bottleneck. Although Trump still insists that the energy shock will ease after the war, the government has not yet clarified how it will persuade Iran to restore navigation through the strait. (Jinshi)

data.title: Japan's Former BOJ Economist: Iran Conflict Raises Inflation Risks, Rate Hike Possible
data.description: According to Jin10, former Bank of Japan (BOJ) chief economist Toshitaka Sekine has indicated that the ongoing conflict in Iran is escalating inflation risks, providing a strong rationale for the BOJ to consider a rate hike as early as this month. In an interview on Wednesday, Sekine stated, "If the intention is to assess the situation, I believe action in April is feasible. By the end of April, we should at least know whether the impact of the Middle East situation is merely temporary." While experts continue to debate whether the geopolitical shock will lead to inflation or deflation for resource-scarce Japan, Sekine's comments suggest that the BOJ may have increased confidence in the necessity of a rate hike when setting policy on April 28. Having served at the BOJ for over 30 years, Sekine speculates that central bank officials may align with his view, as the minutes from the March policy meeting clearly show growing concern among committee members about inflation risks.

data.title: STOCKS | Chinese Shipping Stocks Surge as COSCO Shipping Energy and Others See Gains
data.description: Chinese shipping stocks experienced a significant surge, with COSCO Shipping Energy leading the charge. According to Jin10, COSCO Shipping Energy hit the daily limit, while other companies such as Dajin Heavy Industry, Qinhuangdao Port, and COSCO Shipping Energy saw increases of over 5%. Additionally, China Merchants Energy Shipping and Air China Cargo also followed the upward trend.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $1.3158 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $1.3158 million yesterday (April 1st, Eastern Time). Only the 21Shares XRP ETF (TOXR) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $1.3158 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to -$25.1838 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF's total net asset value is $948 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.14%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.208 billion.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Predicts Recovery in Oil Production and Capital Markets
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed optimism regarding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, stating that it will occur naturally once the ongoing conflict concludes. According to NS3.AI, Trump also anticipates a significant increase in U.S. oil production in the near future. He further commented on the potential recovery of capital markets, including the stock market, following the resolution of the conflict.

data.title: Hyperliquid's HyperEVM Faces Suspected Major Service Outage
data.description: A suspected major service outage has been reported affecting Hyperliquid's HyperEVM, according to PeckShield. The incident has raised concerns among users and stakeholders about the stability and reliability of the platform. Further details on the cause and extent of the outage are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Trump Asserts U.S. Independence from Middle East Oil and Warns Iran on Nuclear Weapons
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump declared in a national address that the United States is no longer reliant on Middle East oil. According to NS3.AI, Trump emphasized that Iran would never be permitted to acquire nuclear weapons. He further claimed that the majority of Iran's leaders were deceased and that the country's navy and air force were no longer operational.
